summary: Recording suffers from out‑of‑phase channels that need inversion, but reviewers consider it a good source once fixed; no performance details were provided.
review: The sole reviewer notes a serious phase issue – the left and right channels are opposite polarity – which can be corrected by inverting one side. After this fix the recording is described as very nice, earning a solid four‑star rating. No comments on the musical performance or setlist were given.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it rates the show 4 stars despite a technical flaw, indicating overall satisfaction but limited data for a robust rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Channels are out of phase; one side needs inversion. Reviewers say the recording is very nice after this correction.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance or setlist comments were provided in the review.
